# Sidebars and Navigation

Sidebars organize documentation into a navigable hierarchy. Docusaurus supports both autogenerated and manually configured sidebars.

## Sidebar Configuration File

Create `sidebars.js` (or `.ts`) in your project root:

```typescript
// sidebars.ts
import type {SidebarsConfig} from '@docusaurus/plugin-content-docs';

const sidebars: SidebarsConfig = {
  docs: [
    // Sidebar items here
  ],
};

export default sidebars;
```

## Autogenerated Sidebars

The simplest approach - let Docusaurus generate the sidebar from your file structure:

```typescript
const sidebars: SidebarsConfig = {
  docs: [
    {
      type: 'autogenerated',
      dirName: '.', // Generate from docs root
    },
  ],
};
```

### Controlling Autogeneration with `_category_.json`

Place `_category_.json` files in directories to configure categories:

```json
{
  "label": "Getting Started",
  "position": 1,
  "collapsed": false,
  "collapsible": true,
  "className": "getting-started-category",
  "link": {
    "type": "generated-index",
    "title": "Getting Started Guide",
    "description": "Learn the basics",
    "slug": "/getting-started",
    "keywords": ["getting-started", "intro"]
  }
}
```

Or use `_category_.yml`:

```yaml
label: Getting Started
position: 1
collapsed: false
link:
  type: doc
  id: intro  # Link to a specific doc
```

### Controlling Order with Frontmatter

Set `sidebar_position` in doc frontmatter:

```yaml
---
sidebar_position: 1
sidebar_label: Introduction
---
```

Or use numeric prefixes in filenames (e.g., `01-intro.md`, `02-setup.md`). These are stripped from URLs.

## Manual Sidebar Configuration

For full control, define sidebar items manually:

```typescript
const sidebars: SidebarsConfig = {
  docs: [
    // Simple doc link
    'intro',

    // Doc with custom label
    {
      type: 'doc',
      id: 'getting-started',
      label: 'Get Started',
    },

    // Category with items
    {
      type: 'category',
      label: 'Guides',
      collapsed: false,
      items: [
        'guides/installation',
        'guides/configuration',
        'guides/deployment',
      ],
    },

    // External link
    {
      type: 'link',
      label: 'GitHub',
      href: 'https://github.com/org/repo',
    },

    // HTML content
    {
      type: 'html',
      value: '<hr/><div class="sidebar-title">Resources</div>',
      className: 'sidebar-divider',
    },
  ],
};
```

## Sidebar Item Types

### Doc Item

Links to a documentation page:

```typescript
{
  type: 'doc',
  id: 'path/to/doc',        // Doc ID (path from docs root, no extension)
  label: 'Custom Label',     // Optional: override sidebar label
  className: 'custom-class', // Optional: CSS class
}

// Shorthand
'path/to/doc'
```

### Category

Groups related items:

```typescript
{
  type: 'category',
  label: 'Category Name',
  items: [
    'doc1',
    'doc2',
  ],

  // Optional settings
  collapsed: true,           // Start collapsed
  collapsible: true,         // Allow collapsing
  className: 'my-category',

  // Category link options
  link: {
    type: 'doc',
    id: 'category-overview',  // Link to a doc
  },
  // OR
  link: {
    type: 'generated-index',  // Auto-generated index page
    title: 'Category Overview',
    description: 'All docs in this category',
    slug: '/category-slug',
  },
}
```

### Link

External or internal links:

```typescript
{
  type: 'link',
  label: 'External Site',
  href: 'https://example.com',
}

// Internal link (non-doc page)
{
  type: 'link',
  label: 'Blog',
  href: '/blog',
}
```

### HTML

Custom HTML content:

```typescript
{
  type: 'html',
  value: '<div class="sidebar-banner">New!</div>',
  className: 'sidebar-custom-html',
  defaultStyle: true, // Apply default styles
}
```

### Autogenerated (within manual config)

Mix autogenerated with manual:

```typescript
{
  type: 'category',
  label: 'API Reference',
  items: [
    {
      type: 'autogenerated',
      dirName: 'api', // Generate from docs/api/
    },
  ],
}
```

### Ref

Reference another sidebar:

```typescript
{
  type: 'ref',
  id: 'doc-in-another-sidebar',
}
```

## Multiple Sidebars

Different sidebars for different doc sections:

```typescript
const sidebars: SidebarsConfig = {
  // Main docs sidebar
  docs: [
    'intro',
    {
      type: 'category',
      label: 'Guides',
      items: ['guides/getting-started', 'guides/advanced'],
    },
  ],

  // Separate API sidebar
  api: [
    'api/overview',
    {
      type: 'autogenerated',
      dirName: 'api/reference',
    },
  ],

  // Tutorial sidebar
  tutorial: [
    'tutorial/intro',
    'tutorial/step-1',
    'tutorial/step-2',
  ],
};
```

Link navbar items to specific sidebars:

```typescript
navbar: {
  items: [
    {
      type: 'docSidebar',
      sidebarId: 'docs',
      label: 'Docs',
    },
    {
      type: 'docSidebar',
      sidebarId: 'api',
      label: 'API',
    },
  ],
}
```

## Navbar Configuration

### Item Types

```typescript
navbar: {
  items: [
    // Doc sidebar link
    {
      type: 'docSidebar',
      sidebarId: 'docs',
      label: 'Documentation',
      position: 'left',
    },

    // Direct doc link
    {
      type: 'doc',
      docId: 'intro',
      label: 'Introduction',
      position: 'left',
    },

    // Internal link
    {
      to: '/blog',
      label: 'Blog',
      position: 'left',
    },

    // External link
    {
      href: 'https://github.com/org/repo',
      label: 'GitHub',
      position: 'right',
    },

    // Dropdown menu
    {
      type: 'dropdown',
      label: 'Resources',
      position: 'left',
      items: [
        { type: 'doc', docId: 'faq', label: 'FAQ' },
        { to: '/community', label: 'Community' },
        { href: 'https://discord.gg/...', label: 'Discord' },
      ],
    },

    // Version dropdown
    {
      type: 'docsVersionDropdown',
      position: 'right',
      dropdownActiveClassDisabled: true,
    },

    // Locale dropdown
    {
      type: 'localeDropdown',
      position: 'right',
    },

    // Search bar
    {
      type: 'search',
      position: 'right',
    },

    // Custom HTML
    {
      type: 'html',
      position: 'right',
      value: '<button class="custom-btn">Sign Up</button>',
    },
  ],
}
```

### Navbar Logo

```typescript
navbar: {
  title: 'My Site',
  logo: {
    alt: 'Site Logo',
    src: 'img/logo.svg',
    srcDark: 'img/logo-dark.svg',  // Dark mode variant
    href: '/',
    target: '_self',
    width: 32,
    height: 32,
    className: 'navbar-logo',
  },
  hideOnScroll: true,  // Hide navbar on scroll down
  style: 'dark',       // 'primary' | 'dark'
}
```

## Footer Configuration

### Multi-Column Footer

```typescript
footer: {
  style: 'dark',
  logo: {
    alt: 'Logo',
    src: 'img/logo.svg',
    href: '/',
    width: 64,
    height: 64,
  },
  links: [
    {
      title: 'Docs',
      items: [
        { label: 'Getting Started', to: '/docs/intro' },
        { label: 'API Reference', to: '/docs/api' },
        { label: 'Examples', to: '/docs/examples' },
      ],
    },
    {
      title: 'Community',
      items: [
        { label: 'Discord', href: 'https://discord.gg/...' },
        { label: 'Twitter', href: 'https://twitter.com/...' },
        { label: 'Stack Overflow', href: 'https://stackoverflow.com/...' },
      ],
    },
    {
      title: 'More',
      items: [
        { label: 'Blog', to: '/blog' },
        { label: 'GitHub', href: 'https://github.com/...' },
        {
          html: `<a href="https://netlify.com"><img src="/img/netlify.svg" alt="Deploys by Netlify" /></a>`,
        },
      ],
    },
  ],
  copyright: `Copyright © ${new Date().getFullYear()} My Company, Inc. Built with Docusaurus.`,
}
```

### Simple Footer

```typescript
footer: {
  style: 'light',
  links: [
    { label: 'Docs', to: '/docs' },
    { label: 'Blog', to: '/blog' },
    { label: 'GitHub', href: 'https://github.com/...' },
  ],
  copyright: `© ${new Date().getFullYear()} My Company`,
}
```

## Breadcrumbs

Enabled by default in docs. Configure in docs plugin:

```typescript
docs: {
  breadcrumbs: true,  // Enable/disable breadcrumbs
}
```

Custom breadcrumb labels via frontmatter:

```yaml
---
title: Very Long Document Title Here
sidebar_label: Short Label
---
```

## Pagination

Configure previous/next links at page bottom:

```yaml
---
pagination_prev: getting-started/intro
pagination_next: advanced/tips
---
```

Disable pagination:

```yaml
---
pagination_prev: null
pagination_next: null
---
```

## Table of Contents

Configure depth in theme config:

```typescript
themeConfig: {
  tableOfContents: {
    minHeadingLevel: 2,
    maxHeadingLevel: 4,
  },
}
```

Per-page override:

```yaml
---
toc_min_heading_level: 2
toc_max_heading_level: 6
hide_table_of_contents: false
---
```
